heading: Use of funds for unspecified purposes or for increased amounts
label: 3714 Use of funds for unspecified purposes or for increased amounts
notes: Amendments2017—Subsecs. (a)(1)(C), (b)(3). substituted “15 days” for “45 days”.Pub. L. 115–912016—Subsecs. (a)(1)(C), (b)(3). substituted “45 days” for “15 days”.Pub. L. 114–328
amendments: Amendments2017—Subsecs. (a)(1)(C), (b)(3). substituted “15 days” for “45 days”.Pub. L. 115–912016—Subsecs. (a)(1)(C), (b)(3). substituted “45 days” for “15 days”.Pub. L. 114–328

children.heading: Notice to Congress of intent to use funds for unspecified purposes
children.label: a Notice to Congress of intent to use funds for unspecified purposes
A
children.text: the Secretary determines that such obligation or expenditure is necessary in the national interests of the United States;

children.label: i
children.text: notification of the intent of the Secretary to make such an obligation or expenditure of funds; and

children.label: ii
children.text: a complete discussion of the purpose and justification for such obligation or expenditure, including the amount of funds to be obligated or expended; and

children.label: C
children.text: a period of 15 days has elapsed following the date on which the Secretary submits the notification and discussion under subparagraph (B).

children.heading: Construction with other laws
children.label: 2 Construction with other laws
children.text: Paragraph (1) may not be construed to authorize the obligation or expenditure of Cooperative Threat Reduction Program funds for a purpose for which the obligation or expenditure of such funds is specifically prohibited under or any other provision of law.section 3731 of this title

children.heading: Limited authority to vary individual amounts provided for any fiscal year for specified purposes
children.label: b Limited authority to vary individual amounts provided for any fiscal year for specified purposes

children.text: the Secretary determines that such obligation or expenditure is necessary in the national interests of the United States;

children.label: A
children.text: notification of the intent of the Secretary to make such an obligation or expenditure of funds in excess of such authorized amount; and

children.label: B
children.text: a complete discussion of the justification for exceeding such specified amounts, including the amount by which the Secretary will exceed such specified amounts; and
a period of 15 days has elapsed following the date on which the Secretary submits the notification and discussion under paragraph (2).
